violations.text: The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, chopper, and bar ice chest) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Chopped ham was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview, containers of meatballs were placed hot in covered plastic container in the prep unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Handwashing sink was observed between a food chopper and food prep sink without splash guards. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Bowls and single use containers are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Single use containers were observed being reused to store other food product. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

A wooden platform was observed under the ice maker in the food storage room. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Ice machine and prep tables were observed with original plastic coating. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit and utensil bin have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
The door to the bar toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The receptacle in the bar toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of soil and debris around the outdoor refuse area. Area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

A wall in the food prep area is constructed of dry wall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
Beverages and cooking oil were observed stored on the floor throughout the facility. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024
